subject: A purple-skinned merfolk wizard with horn-like protrusions and elaborate ornate headdress, hands raised in a gesture of arcane summoning or divination
description: A close-mid shot of a sinister-looking merfolk wizard with deep purple skin, bald cranium adorned with horn-like protrusions or an elaborate ornamental headpiece curving back from the skull, and glowing pale eyes. The figure raises both hands, fingers splayed, in a gesture of casting or revelation. Wisps of blue energy or smoke curl around the figure against a dark, hazy blue background. The ornate jewelry and ceremonial bearing suggest a servant or augur of a higher power. The palette is dominated by deep blues, violets, and pale highlights, with the figure rim-lit by ambient magical light.
foreground: purple-skinned merfolk wizard with ornate horned headdress, hands raised in arcane gesture
background: hazy dark blue void with curling wisps of arcane smoke or energy
emotion: calm, knowing, sinister authority; the slight smile and steady forward gaze of someone in control of hidden knowledge
